prompt: Generate a celadon vase (from image 3), adorned with a flowing, intricate pattern combining the tilework style of image 1 and floral motifs from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a celadon vase with the elegant shape and characteristic green-blue glaze of the vase in image 3. Adorn its surface with a flowing, intricate decorative pattern. This pattern should integrate the curvilinear, interlocking arabesque style from image 1, seamlessly incorporating the stylized carnation and tulip floral motifs characteristic of image 2 throughout the design.
